enrichment.summary: Kyle recounts his personal experience on Medicaid since 2014, detailing the healthcare services he has received including lipoma removals, therapy and neuropsychological evaluation referrals, eye care, and a dermatology referral. He compares Medicaid favorably to universal healthcare he received while traveling in Indonesia, Malaysia, and Argentina, and advocates strongly for single-payer healthcare in the United States.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: positive personal experience; appreciates the coverage and access it has provided
strongly supports it; thinks the US should adopt full single-payer like other countries
should be redirected to fund Medicaid and public health
supports taxing the rich to fund education and social programs
finds it hypocritical and stupid; notes opponents now benefit from it
believes cryogenic freezing is a superior and faster removal technique than standard surgical excision
